LIONESS LINE: Saturday 18 and Sunday 19 July: On Saturday and Sunday a reduced service will run at certain times between Kilburn High Road and Euston. Trains departing Euston, between 0715 and 2115, at 15 minutes each hour will start from Kilburn High Road. On Sunday, trains departing Watford Junction, between 1130 and 2030, at 30 minutes past each hour, will terminate at Kilburn High Road. Trains departing Euston, between 1215 and 2115, at 15 minutes each hour will start from Kilburn High Road.
